goals.title: Implement orchestrator mode stabilization for ATLAS. Stabilize orches...
goals.objective: Implement orchestrator mode stabilization for ATLAS. Stabilize orchestrator dispatch with strict evidence gates preserved: positive mock/real worker paths complete only with valid stage evidence; missing/invalid evidence becomes error or blocked and blocks downstream; pipeline state and UI preserve blocked vs failed; single-worker mode remains unaffected. Use the existing plan at .omo/plans/orchestrator-mode-stabilization.md as scope.
